message.reasoning:
We are analyzing a baseline phase assessment. The profile shows low conscientiousness (15.518%), low neuroticism (7.699%), moderate openness (58.442%). The reasoning ties low conscientiousness to skepticism about defense spending, prioritizing social programs. The score -217 is a fine-grained value, not round. It is not extreme (|score| 217 < 850). The reasoning references specific profile traits (conscientiousness, agreeableness, trust) and connects to the issue. No apparent implausibility. Heuristic checks pass. No rewrite needed.

Thus plausibility high, consistency high.
